hero.text: Love is the bridge between you and everything.
hero.author: Rumi

aries.general: Today brings a burst of energy, ideal for undertaking new ventures.
aries.love: Romantic sparks could fly unexpectedly; be open to surprise.
aries.career: Collaborations will thrive today, leading to promising projects.

taurus.general: Stability will be your foundation today, allowing for sensible decisions.
taurus.love: A heartfelt conversation can enhance your romantic connections.
taurus.career: Stay grounded in your approach; it will benefit your work life significantly.

gemini.general: Your charisma radiates today, attracting new friendships and opportunities.
gemini.love: A playful attitude in love will strengthen your bonds.
gemini.career: Networking is key; reach out to colleagues for collaborative efforts.

cancer.general: Emphasize your emotional intelligence to navigate today’s challenges.
cancer.love: Nurturing moments with loved ones will deepen your bonds.
cancer.career: Your empathy will shine in team settings; use this to your advantage.

leo.general: Confidence is your ally; don’t hesitate to showcase your talents.
leo.love: Your vibrant energy can reignite the spark in existing relationships.
leo.career: Leadership opportunities may arise; be prepared to step forward.

virgo.general: Practicality will guide you through today’s decisions effectively.
virgo.love: Small gestures of kindness can significantly enhance your relationships.
virgo.career: Attention to detail will set you apart in your projects today.

libra.general: Balance is pivotal; seek harmony in your interactions with others.
libra.love: A romantic outing could reignite the passion in your relationships.
libra.career: Collaborative efforts will bring about the best results today.

scorpio.general: Your determination will help you overcome any obstacles in your path.
scorpio.love: Emotional depth will strengthen your connection with your partner.
scorpio.career: Take the initiative on a project; your input is valued.

sagittarius.general: Adventure calls; embrace spontaneity in your plans today.
sagittarius.love: An exciting date could bring newfound joy into your romantic life.
sagittarius.career: Opportunities for travel or exploration in your job may arise.

capricorn.general: Focus on long-term goals; today's efforts will pay off later.
capricorn.love: Be honest about your feelings; openness will strengthen your bond.
capricorn.career: You may find that hard work begins to yield rewards.

aquarius.general: Innovation is in the air; use your unique perspective to your advantage.
aquarius.love: New friendships may blossom into romantic interests.
aquarius.career: Your creativity will help you solve problems effectively today.

pisces.general: Your intuition will guide you during a moment of decision.
pisces.love: Cultivating kindness and compassion will enhance your love life.
pisces.career: Follow your heart when it comes to professional choices today.

professional.text: Success usually comes to those who are too busy to be looking for it.
professional.author: Henry David Thoreau

professional.text: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
professional.author: Steve Jobs

professional.text: Opportunities don't happen. You create them.
professional.author: Chris Grosser

professional.text: I find that the harder I work, the more luck I seem to have.
professional.author: Thomas Jefferson

professional.text: Don't watch the clock; do what it does. Keep going.
professional.author: Sam Levenson

professional.text: Success is the sum of small efforts, repeated day in and day out.
professional.author: Robert Collier

motivation.text: The future belongs to those who believe in the beauty of their dreams.
motivation.author: Eleanor Roosevelt

motivation.text: What lies behind us and what lies before us are tiny matters compared to what lies within us.
motivation.author: Ralph Waldo Emerson

motivation.text: Believe you can and you're halfway there.
motivation.author: Theodore Roosevelt

motivation.text: Don't count the days, make the days count.
motivation.author: Muhammad Ali

motivation.text: You are never too old to set another goal or to dream a new dream.
motivation.author: C.S. Lewis

motivation.text: Act as if what you do makes a difference. It does.
motivation.author: William James

captions.text: Find joy in the little things.

tech.text: The best way to predict the future is to invent it.
tech.author: Alan Kay

tech.text: Technology is best when it brings people together.
tech.author: Matt Mullenweg

tech.text: It's not a faith in technology. It's faith in people.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: Any sufficiently advanced technology is indistinguishable from magic.
tech.author: Arthur C. Clarke

tech.text: Innovation distinguishes between a leader and a follower.
tech.author: Steve Jobs

tech.text: The greatest advances of civilization, whether in agriculture, industry, or communications, have seldom come from centralized government.
tech.author: Milton Friedman

fun.text: Life is short. Smile while you still have teeth.
I'm on a seafood diet. I see food and I eat it.
I used to think I was indecisive, but now I'm not too sure.
Why don't scientists trust atoms? Because they make up everything!
I told my computer I needed a break, and now it won't stop sending me beach wallpapers.
I have a fear of speed bumps, but I’m slowly getting over it.

faith.text: Faith does not eliminate questions. But faith knows where to take them.
faith.author: Elisabeth Elliot

faith.text: Faith is taking the first step even when you don’t see the whole staircase.
faith.author: Martin Luther King Jr.

faith.text: The greatest test of faith is when you don’t get what you want.
With faith, all things are possible.
Faith is the bird that feels the light and sings when the dawn is still dark.
faith.author: Rabindranath Tagore

wisdom.text: The only true wisdom is in knowing you know nothing.
wisdom.author: Socrates

wisdom.text: In seeking wisdom, we may find simplicity.
Wisdom is not a product of schooling but of the lifelong attempt to acquire it.
wisdom.author: Albert Einstein

wisdom.text: The mind is everything. What you think, you become.
wisdom.author: Buddha

wisdom.text: Knowing yourself is the beginning of all wisdom.
wisdom.author: Aristotle
